ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "show_name" TEXT /* Name of the show or performance */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the event is held */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the event is located */,
  "event_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the event */,
  "ticket_vendor" TEXT /* Vendor through which tickets are sold */,
  "event_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in minutes */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (scheduled, ongoing, completed) */,
  "promoter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the promoter managing the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_promoter_id FOREIGN KEY ("promoter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of venue (e.g., concert hall, outdoor arena) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the venue */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist or band */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Music genre of the artist */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event associated with the ticket */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Number of tickets available for purchase */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was purchased */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., VIP, General Admission) */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code applicable to the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ticket sold */,
  "sale_amount" REAL /* Total amount from the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale occurred */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_events" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the artist-event association */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "performance_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the artist will perform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_events_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event related to the feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user attended the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
